data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_2.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_2F_Text_Lea: Learn to use items properly.\nThat's basic, really.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_2.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_2F_Text_Goo: My husband is waiting at home.\nWhat would make a good gift for him?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_2.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_2F_Text_Sto: I'm leaving on a long journey soon.\nI need to stock up on items.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_2.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_2F_Text_Unu: FOR YOUR TRAVELING COMPANIONS\n2F: TRAINER'S ZONE
